nodes.description: The shocking Young-hee doll from the first episode of the smash-hit Netflix series Squid Game joins TAMASHII Lab! Featuring a motorized rotating head, and replaying key sounds and lines, it lets you re-create the 'Red Light, Green Light' game on your tabletop! Accurately sculpted to capture its onscreen appearance, it even features an eye-color-changing gimmick for added realism!
nodes.name: Young-hee Doll

nodes.description: Sideshow and Joytoy are proud to present the Space Wolves Thunderwolf Cavalry Frode Collectible Set!  A small, elite unit of the Space Wolves, the Thunderwolf Cavalry, are a near-mythical presence; decorated and proud warriors rumored to have ridden massive Fenrisian Thunderwolves into Battle. Captured here in highly detailed 1:18 scale form, this set features Cavalry Frode and his mighty Thunderwolf, along with an array of weapons and armor.  Ride into battle and add this incredible set to your Warhammer 40k collection today!
nodes.name: Space Wolves Thunderwolf Cavalry Frode

nodes.description: Sideshow and Joytoy are proud to present the Space Wolves Thunderwolf Cavalry Bjane Collectible Set!  A small, elite unit of the Space Wolves, the Thunderwolf Cavalry, are a near-mythical presence; decorated and proud warriors rumored to have ridden massive Fenrisian Thunderwolves into Battle. Captured here in highly detailed 1:18 scale form, this set features Cavalry Bjane and his mighty Thunderwolf, along with an array of weapons and armor.  Ride into battle and add this incredible set to your Warhammer 40k collection today!
nodes.name: Space Wolves Thunderwolf Cavalry Bjane

nodes.description: A perfect combination with the S.H.Figuarts Masked Soldier and Masked Worker/Manager figures (each sold separately). The mysterious leader of the guards, who seem to work for him... Standing 5.7 inches tall and featuring multiple points of articulation for easy posing and featuring a number of optional and removable accessories, this figure is sure to cast an imposing presence in your collection. Includes telephone and satellite phone.
nodes.name: Front Man

nodes.description: The Masked Worker / Masked Manager from the smash-hit Netflix series Squid Game joins S.H.Figuarts! Standing 5.7 inches tall and featuring multiple points of articulation for easy posing and featuring a number of optional and removable accessories, this figure is sure to cast an imposing presence in your collection. Includes optional parts for displaying as either type of guard. A knife and backpack accessory are included, too.
nodes.name: Masked Worker/Masked Manager

nodes.description: The Masked Soldier from the smash-hit Netflix series Squid Game joins S.H.Figuarts! Standing 5.7 inches tall and featuring multiple points of articulation for easy posing and featuring a number of optional and removable accessories, this figure is sure to cast an imposing presence in your collection. Includes handgun and machine gun accessories, plus a papercraft coffin for added realism.
nodes.name: Masked Soldier

nodes.description: The pin-up queen of adventure is back! Sideshow and Dynamite Entertainment proudly present Bettie Page in an all-new series under the guidance of writer Stephen Mooney, ably assisted by artist Jethro 'Jet' Morales.  Utilizing several clues found at the ancient Key Artifact site in the Middle Americas, McKnight and Bettie surmise that the Key Artifact has been relocated to an ancient burial site in rural Ireland. They give chase, presented in a collectible Virgin Metal Cover by the incomparable Jae Lee! Ships bagged and boarded with a Dynamite Certificate of Authenticity!
nodes.name: Bettie Page: The Curse of the Banshee - Jae Lee Metal Cover

nodes.description: The Queen of the Jungle Returns! Featuring an all-star creative team, this thrilling adventure combines the classic elements of the legendary character along with a modern sensibility Sheena has entered the MegaPark.  Under the watchful eye of her keeps at Cardwell Industries - in search of her animal friends and the mysterious beast wreaking havoc in the man-made jungle, but what she's discovered threatens to destroy her very world!  Jurassic Park meets Predator meets The Hunger Games. Sheena is Queen of all! Jamie Biggs Todd McFarlane Homage Cover, ships bagged and boarded with a Dynamite Certificate of Authenticity!
nodes.name: Sheena Queen of the Jungle #2 Jamie Biggs Metal Cover Variant

nodes.description: Sideshow and Mighty Jaxx present the Klaus Hargreeves Vinyl Collectible.  The charismatic cult-leader of the Hargreeves family, Klaus, is captured in YARMS Studios' signature style with clean lines and minimalist aesthetics.  On his palms, the words hello and goodbye are tattooed.  The Umbrella Academy: Klaus Hargreeves by YARMS immortalizes the spiritual figurehead of Destiny's Children, shower him with your adulation.
nodes.name: Klaus Hargreeves

nodes.description: Sideshow and Mighty Jaxx present the Vecna Vinyl Collectible.  It's time. Vecna from Netflix's Stranger Things Season 4 has crossed over from the Upside Down and is ready to show his destructive powers.  Featuring the iconic grandfather clock and the hive mind of intertwined vines, this vinyl collectible captures much that we love (and fear) from the incredible season.  As Vecna extends an evil arm, look out for a secret detail hidden on his wrist… See you on the other side with Stranger Things x Mighty Jaxx: Vecna!
nodes.name: Vecna

nodes.description: Sideshow and Mighty Jaxx present the No. 5 Vinyl Collectible.  No. 5, a 60-year-old man time traveler and master assassin trapped in the body of a 13-year-old, is captured in YARMS Studios' signature style with clean lines and minimalist aesthetics.  He is accompanied by Dolores who has gone through thick and thin with him while he was trapped in the future.  Immortalize the touching moment when No. 5 is reunited with Dolores with The Umbrella Academy: No. 5 by YARMS.
nodes.name: No. 5

nodes.description: Sideshow and Mighty Jaxx present the Allison Hargreeves Vinyl Collectible.  A celebrity with a super power that can influence people and events, Allison is captured in YARMS Studios' signature style with clean lines and minimalist aesthetics.  Immortalize a pivotal part of her character's journey with The Umbrella Academy: Allison Hargreeves by YARMS.  Having lost her ability to speak, she tries to rebuild strained relationships with her family with a written apology.
nodes.name: Allison Hargreeves

nodes.description: Sideshow and Tamashii Nations are excited to present the Gogeta Super Saiyan 4 (Saiyan Warrior with Ultimate Power) Statue!  A new collaboration between FiguartsZERO and Dokkan Battle, commemorating the seventh anniversary of the popular mobile game! Super Saiyan 4 Gogeta joins the FiguartsZERO Chogekisen series with dynamic effect parts that faithfully capture his illustrated appearance.  Don't miss your chance to add this finely sculpted statue to your Dragon Ball GT collection today!
nodes.name: Gogeta Super Saiyan 4 (Saiyan Warrior with Ultimate Power)

nodes.description: 'I'm a shooting star!'  From the globally popular esports game 'League of Legends' comes a scale figure of Star Guardian Jinx!  Jinx's dynamic twintails and crazy expression from the in-game illustration have been faithfully brought into figure form. Kuro & Shiro, her magical mediums that transform into physical weapons, have also been sculpted to perfectly capture their adorable looks. The figure's base made to look like a shooting star is another highlight fans won't want to miss!  Be sure to add Star Guardian Jinx—the girl who, despite her selfishness, will always fiercely protect those she holds dear—to your collection today!
nodes.name: Star Guardian Jinx

nodes.description: Evolved to rule the skies, the Swarm's aerial siege unit is making its way to your gaming den with the Zerg Brood Lord Mini Replica, brought to you exclusively by Sideshow, Blizzard Entertainment and Dark Horse Deluxe!  The Brood Lord measures 6 inches long by 6 inches wide, and is made from polyresin. It also includes a metal display post to hover over a sturdy Zerg Swarm 4 x 6 base. This Brood Lord will make you feel as if a batch of broodlings are about to be spawned!  With a Zerg Brood Lord at your disposal, make sure your Terran and Protoss fleets are prepared for an epic intergalactic battle. Order now to unleash utter devastation upon any foe!
nodes.name: Zerg Brood Lord

nodes.description: If it bleeds we can kill it   To celebrate the 35th Anniversary of the original Predator movie, Hollywood Collectibles Group has accurately recreated the Predator Bio-Helmet. This Bio-Helmet can trace its lineage to an original screen-used helmet for authenticity and accuracy.  The Bio-Helmet, or Environment Helmet, can be removed from its display stand and features a functioning light-up LED target acquisition system , and a highly detailed interior.  This intricately detailed, Museum Quality piece is constructed from fiberglass, resin, and mixed media and then hand painted to the finest detail, with authentic weathering for added realism!   This amazing life-size Prop Replica is available in a strictly Limited Edition of 500 individually numbered pieces Worldwide.   Hunt down the Bio-Helmet and add to your Predator collection today, before it hunts you!
nodes.name: Predator Bio-Helmet

nodes.description: Sideshow and Cryptozoic Entertainment present the Batman with Batarang Statue from the Gotham City Grit collection. This statue stands approximately 10' tall and features Batman's iconic weapon of choice.  A must-have for any Batman collection!
nodes.name: Batman with Batarang
Boba Fett and Han Solo in Carbonite Premium Format Figure

nodes.description: Big Mom is a character that fans love to hate! As the legendary woman of the sea and the only woman among the legendary Four Emperors, the four most notorious and dangerous pirates in the world. She has the superb ability and unique personality that allows her to stand side by side with the other three emperors.  The design of this work is full of anger when chasing Luffy on the sea. An expression captured in a violent state, and the shape also shows Big Mom's bad temper from the aspects of the carving of her facial expression and body language. Eyebrows turned downward, gaze as sharp as a sword, her facial features ferociously crowded into a scowl, eyes glaring as if emitting a sharp light.  Her cloak is sculpted blown upward, showing her in an action pose mid-swing, her sword blazing leaving a trail of flames behind it. The polka-dot, lace and jewelry on the clothes are carefully depicted, and even the beads on the bracelet are restored to their original crystal clear. She is shown surrounded by Zeus, Prometheus and Napoleon. The typicaly lovely and gluttonous Zeus has changed his usual kind appearance and turned into a thundercloud, carrying thunder and lightning at the feet of the big mom. Prometheus has used his power like a ball of fire, while his facial features still existed, showing a more cunning and sinister appearance. Beneath Zeus is the familiar platform of Cake Island, a paradise for foodies. Unlike big mom's 'fierce' temperament, Cake Island can be described as lovely. The island of cream cakes and cookies is sweet and dreamy, full of sweet flavor. It also echoes the nature of Charlotte Linlin's tastes, the desire for sweets and mayhem, coupled with the waves stirred up during the battle, the picture is full of color, but also a realistic restoration of the fierce wartime scenes.
nodes.name: Big Mom

nodes.description: Sideshow, Threezero, and Marvel Studios are pleased to announce DLX Iron Man Mark 43 (Battle Damage) as the next figure in the DLX collectibles series based on Marvel Studios' The Infinity Saga. The DLX Iron Man Mark 43 suit has been revised with carefully-crafted battle-damaged details that enhance the lifelike appearance of the figure. This fully-articulated collectible figure stands at 6.9 (~17.5cm) tall and is constructed of Threezero's renown DLX die-cast system with over 48 points of articulation.  With Threezero's specialized engineering, DLX Iron Man Mark 43 (Battle Damage) can achieve a higher poseable function than its contemporaries, and easily recreate the character's signature landing pose without any difficulty. It has also adopted threezero's detailed and weathered paint application, strongly capturing the spirit of DLX.  Like the standard release, DLX Iron Man Mark 43 (Battle Damage) has detachable forearms and torso so that it may fit inside the Mark 44 Hulkbuster armor. Attachable arm rockets can be fixed onto both forearms, and two lighting functions are located on the figure; one in the chest and one in the eyes. The two air flaps on the back can be flipped open and close.  The Infinity Saga – DLX Iron Man Mark 43 (Battle Damage) figure includes two attachable arm rockets; five pairs of interchangeable hands: one pair of fists, one pair of relaxed hands, one pair of shooting hands, one pair of flying hands, and one pair of shooting hands (to assemble the shooting effect); two pairs of effect parts: one pair of shooting effects, and one pair of flying effects (for the feet); and one DLX action stand.  Add to your Marvel Collection today!
nodes.name: DLX Iron Man Mark 43 (Battle Damage)

nodes.description: Sideshow, Trick or Treat Studios, and Living Dead Media are proud to present the official Return of the Living Dead Tarman Sixth Scale Action Figure!  This amazing figure was sculpted from the ground up by Alex Ray and Justin Mabry to give the most movie-accurate look possible. The figure features different materials and finishes to really capture that perfect gooey fresh from the barrel zombie look.  This figure measures approximately 12' and includes 2 interchangeable heads and a brain. To round the package out, the figure comes in a beautiful Collectors Box with a flip-back window display.  The 'BRAINS' head option is inspired by the first time we meet Tarman as he calls for Tina's 'BRAINS!', during this scene Tarman was depicted by a puppet with a slightly different look than the costume version of the character.  And the 'MORE BRAINS' head is inspired by the scene where the group unknowingly encounters Tarman (depicted by a costumed actor) in the basement as they go to help Tina. Tarman exclaims MORE BRAINS! after making a snack out of Suicide.  Don't miss your chance to add this Tarman figure to your collection today!
nodes.name: Tarman

nodes.description: You want to be like me? If you come with me, you'll die here.   Sideshow and Threezero present the Sandor 'The Hound' Clegane (Season 7) Sixth Scale Figure.  The 1/6 scale Sandor The Hound Clegane collectible figure features an authentic likeness to the character's appearance in Season 7 of the hit HBO television series Game of Thrones as portrayed by actor Rory McCain.  The series' award-winning costuming is carefully replicated in tailored clothing with finely-detailed textures and weathering that have become the impressive foundation of threezero's Game of Thrones collectibles line-up.
nodes.name: Sandor "The Hound" Clegane (Season 7)

nodes.description: 'Alright people, let's do this one last time! My name is Peter B. Parker'  Based on the hit movie Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse, Sentinel is excited to present 'Peter B. Parker' as the second character of our new SV-ACTION figure series! This fully articulated figure allows you to replicate various cool and vivid battle scenes as well as funny everyday life as seen in the movie.  It comes with a huge selection of optional parts including 2 heads for the Spider-Man suit, 3 Peter Heads revealing his real face, multiple hand parts for different poses to effect parts and objects like mug, glasses, and a newspaper. An 18cm-long enormous statue is included in this version, allowing even more display possibilities.  Come and have that movie experience in your hands!
nodes.name: Spider-Man Peter B. Parker (Special Version)

nodes.description: You ruined it, wallcrawler! Ya had to keep pushing me … until I finally had to push back.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Spider-Man vs Venom Fine Art Print, a sensational Marvel Comics art print by artist Marco Mastrazzo.  With enemies like this, who needs friends? Peter Parker stands alone in the fight against the villainous Venom, the alien symbiote bonded to Eddie Brock. Hiding in the back alleys of a friendly New York City neighborhood, these two famous rivals duke out their differences in the falling snow. As Spider-Man slings a web to stop a monstrous claw attack, Venom moves to take a bite out of the itsy-bitsy annoyance standing in his way.  Originally created as a retailer-exclusive variant cover for Venom #2 (2021), written by Ram V for Marvel Comics, this comic book collectible is now available for fans in a fine art format. Each Spider-Man vs Venom Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 325 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this Spider-Man wall art makes an action-packed addition to any fan's collection.  Pick your side in the symbiote-on-spider showdown and bring home the Spider-Man vs Venom Fine Art Print by Marco Mastrazzo today!
nodes.name: Spider-Man vs Venom

nodes.description: Sideshow and Threezero present the Optimus Prime (Deluxe Edition) Premium Scale Figure.  Hasbro and Threezero proudly present the next wave of PREMIUM Collectibles with Transformers: The Last Knight!  Optimus Prime has been meticulously adapted and engineered as a highly articulated collectible figure using the film model as a basis.  The PREMIUM Optimus Prime Figure features LED illuminated details, a variety of accessories, and incredibly detailed weathered paintwork.  The officially licensed PREMIUM Optimus Prime stands approximately 19 tall and features 99 points of articulation, LED illuminated eyes, and comes equipped with an interchangeable battle mask, blaster shield, cybertronian sword, and detachable wrist blade.  Don't miss your chance to add Optimus Prime to your Transformers collection!
nodes.name: Optimus Prime (Deluxe Edition)

nodes.description: All everyone wants to do is unmask you, but they're missing the point. You and I both know I'm looking at the real you right now.   Sideshow and Bill Sienkiewicz Art present the Batman: Unmask the Truth Fine Art Lithograph, a dramatic DC Comics art print featuring heroes and villains from the 2022 film The Batman.  Batman's stern, dark, silhouetted side profile shows the pensive hero as he contemplates his place in Gotham. Far below, a fearsome Batman grabs a criminal by the collar. In contrast, waves of rich green and orange flood the scene as a hopeful Batman, flare raised high, leads his city through the water to safety. Between these three depictions of Vengeance himself are the masked Riddler, a gloomy Bruce Wayne, a nervous Penguin, the resolute Jim Gordon, and the captivating Catwoman. The Riddler's red question mark cypher cuts through these characters, intersecting the piece in the same way Edward Nashton's nefarious game intertwined with all their lives.  Each Batman: Unmask the Truth Fine Art Lithograph is hand signed by Sienkiewicz and includes a Certificate of Authenticity as part of the limited edition of only 150 pieces. Available as an unframed certified archival lithograph print and in a custom framed presentation, this Batman artwork is perfect for fans of the Dark Knight's newest cinematic iteration.  Embrace hope and bring home the Batman: Unmask the Truth Fine Art Print by Bill Sienkiewicz today!
nodes.name: Batman™: Unmask the Truth

nodes.description: Sideshow and TBLeague are proud to present the iconic Ghost Soldier (White) Sixth Scale Figure!  The Ghost Soldier (White) comes equipped with a stunning set of white armor along with her shield and two short spears. With a seamless and posable body in highly detailed 1:6 scale form, she is ready to lead her troops into battle!  Add the Ghost Soldier (White) Sixth Scale Figure to your collection today!
nodes.name: Ghost Soldier (White)

nodes.description: 'Alright people, let's do this one last time! My name is Peter B. Parker'  Based on the hit movie Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse, Sentinel is excited to present 'Peter B. Parker' as the second character of our new SV-ACTION figure series! This fully articulated figure allows you to replicate various cool and vivid battle scenes as well as funny everyday life as seen in the movie.  It comes with a huge selection of optional parts including 2 heads for the Spider-Man suit, 3 Peter Heads revealing his real face, multiple hand parts for different poses to effect parts and objects like mug, glasses, and a newspaper.  Come and have that movie experience in your hands!
nodes.name: Spider-Man Peter B. Parker

nodes.description: This isn't a question of what I'm not. This is a question of who I could be.   Sideshow presents the Captain Marvel Fine Art Print, a powerful Marvel art print by Stanley 'Artgerm' Lau.  The Captain Marvel Fine Art Print shows a confident Carol Danvers as she takes flight to confront an unseen enemy in space. Her blonde hair sweeps up, aglow with the flames from the collapsing planet behind her. From her coiled muscles and shimmering red, gold, and blue suit to her determined expression and curled fist, Captain Marvel is undoubtedly poised for an epic battle. And she came to win.  Originally created as a variant cover for Captain Marvel #1 (2019) written by Kelly Thompson, this Marvel Comics collectible is now available to fans in a fine art format. Each Captain Marvel Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Sideshow Seal of Authenticity as part of the limited edition of 325 pieces. Available as an unframed, certified archival fine art print or in a custom framed presentation, this Marvel wall art makes an impressive addition to any collection.  Fly higher, further, faster when you bring home the Captain Marvel Fine Art Print by Stanley 'Artgerm' Lau today!
nodes.name: Captain Marvel

nodes.description: Sideshow and TBLeague are proud to present the iconic Ghost Soldier (Green) Sixth Scale Figure!  The Ghost Soldier (Green) comes equipped with a stunning set of green armor along with her spear and shield. With a seamless and posable body in highly detailed 1:6 scale form, she is ready to lead her troops into battle!  Add the Ghost Soldier (Green) Sixth Scale Figure to your collection today!
nodes.name: Ghost Soldier (Green)

nodes.description: The Caped Crusader always rides in style! The Batmobile featured in the 2022 movie The Batman is a radically bold new interpretation of the character's iconic vehicle.  This Designer Series statue reimagines that Batmobile through the lens of the hot rod-influenced style of Kustom Kulture art from the 1960s. Meticulously crafted and highly detailed, this limited variant features dynamic blue flames!
nodes.name: Batman (Blue Flame Version)

nodes.description: The Caped Crusader always rides in style! The Batmobile featured in the 2022 movie The Batman is a radically bold new interpretation of the character's iconic vehicle.  This Designer Series statue reimagines that Batmobile through the lens of the hot rod-influenced style of Kustom Kulture art from the 1960s. Meticulously crafted and highly detailed, it will be a dynamic addition to any fan's collection!
nodes.name: Batmobile

nodes.description: I really felt quite distressed at not receiving an invitation.   Thomas Kinkade Studios is pleased to present Disney Maleficent, the story of Sleeping Beauty from Maleficent's point of view after Princess Aurora pricks her finger on an enchanted spinning wheel in the castle tower. Maleficent, with The Raven flying to join her, stands triumphantly on a castle turret overlooking King Stefan and King Hubert who have fallen asleep. Flora, Fauna, and Merryweather have snuck into Maleficent's lair in the Forbidden Mountains to free Prince Philip who races to save Aurora, whose kiss can awaken her from the endless sleep.  This enchanting painting captures Maleficent in both of her personas – as an evil fairy, and when she shapeshifted into a dragon in the Forbidden Mountains. Thomas Kinkade Studios painted this art in the narrative panorama style, sharing many characters and moments from the film in one stunning painting.   Lovers of the timeless classic Sleeping Beauty, be sure to add Maleficent to your Disney art print collection today!
nodes.name: Maleficent

nodes.description: I have decided to seal him in this capsule, which will test his internal systems until his reliability has been confirmed.   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Mega Man X Deluxe 1:4 Scale Statue, a futuristic video game collectible celebrating the classic Capcom character. With an immensely detailed display base, this statue is a must-have for diehard fans of the Mega Man X series.  The Mega Man X Deluxe 1:4 Scale Statue measures 30 tall and 18 wide as the iconic hero stands within Dr. Light's construction capsule. One of the Maverick Hunters, Mega Man X is a technologically advanced Reploid capable of independent thinking and feeling. This detailed statue showcases X's unique build as mechanical arms finalize his diagnostics in this hi-tech chamber.   The capsule's blue base lights up to further immerse Mega Man X in the environment, reflecting off his unarmored silver limbs as well as the iconic rounded armor that gives the hero his distinctive silhouette. Mega Man X comes with two expressions — one active, determined face and a portrait with closed eyes to reflect his capsule stasis. Metallic blue paint and red accents complete Mega Man X's intricate robotic look to make this a striking display on any shelf.  The Mavericks have met their match! Protect the future and bring home the Mega Man Deluxe X 1:4 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio today.
nodes.name: Mega Man X Deluxe

nodes.description: From the popular animated series streaming on Disney+, Star Wars: The Bad Batch™, Sideshow and Kotobukiya present a series of 1:7 scale model kits!   Crosshair™ is the squad's calmest member and one of the most calculated and deadly snipers in the galaxy. He sports a crosshair on both his right eye and his helmet as does Hunter™ with the tattoo on his face.   An interchangeable head part without the helmet is also included. The base is of a hexagon shape design that will be standard for all future characters in this series so fans can enjoy lining them up together on display.  Add the Star Wars: The Bad Batch snap-fit model kit series to your collection today!'
nodes.name: Crosshair

nodes.description: We are thrilled – and terrified – to announce a new 1oz pure silver coin for the iconic Crystal Lake mass murderer, Jason Voorhees, from the horror film franchise, Friday the 13th.   This terrifying piece is frosted and shaped to replicate the hockey mask of the psycho killer. Some mirror flashes and a colored engraving of the film name add extra appeal to the design. This realistic look is sure to give you the heebie-jeebies! The Public Seal of Niue can be found on the obverse, confirming it is a legal tender coin.   Each coin comes in specially designed packaging, incorporating another disturbing image of Jason. Printed at the back of the box is the Certificate of Authenticity, along with confirmation of the coin's unique serial number in the limited 2,000 mintage.   Embrace the spooky vibes of this classic today!
nodes.name: Friday the 13th 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: X possesses great risks as well as great possibilities. I can only hope for the best.   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Mega Man X 1:4 Scale Statue, a futuristic video game collectible celebrating the classic Capcom character.  The Collector's Edition Mega Man X 1:4 Scale Statue measures 17 tall and 10 wide, standing on a sleek black statue base. As one of the Maverick Hunters, Mega Man X is a technologically advanced Reploid capable of independent thinking and feeling. This detailed statue showcases X's unique construction, with unarmored silver limbs as well as the iconic blue armor that gives the hero his distinctive silhouette. His expression is one of determination in the fight against criminal Reploids, known as Mavericks. Metallic blue paint and red accents complete Mega Man X's intricate robotic look to make this a striking display on any shelf.   Protect the future and bring home the Mega Man X 1:4 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio today!
nodes.name: Mega Man X

nodes.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse present the Hinata Hyuga (Wedding Ceremony Version) Collectible Figure!  From the anime series Naruto:Shippuden comes a new Naruto Girls Hinata Hyuga figure! Standing at 8.3' tall she is seen wearing her beautiful wedding dress when she married Naruto.  Don't miss your chance to add this Naruto figure to your anime collectibles display today!
nodes.name: Hinata Hyuga (Wedding Ceremony Version)

nodes.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse are excited to present the Novice Ninja Onami (Warriors Alliance) Collectible Figure!  From the One Piece anime comes a new Portrait of Pirates Onami figure. Standing at 8.9' tall the navigator of the Straw Hat Pirates is seen in her blue novice ninja dress and sandals.  Don't miss your chance to add this anime figure to your One Piece collectibles display today!
nodes.name: Novice Ninja Onami (Warriors Alliance)

nodes.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse are excited to present the Trafalgar Law (Playback Memories) Collectible Figure!  From the One Piece anime comes a new Portrait of Pirates Trafalgar Law figure sitting upon a wooden crate with a mischievous smile and his fingers interlocked, playing back memories and dreaming of finding the One Piece.  Don't miss your chance to add this One Piece collectible figure to your anime figure collection today!
nodes.name: Trafalgar Law (Playback Memories)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Factory Entertainment present the Moonraker Laser Prop Replica.  The Factory Entertainment Moonraker Laser prop replica was created after careful study of the original props in the EON Productions archives, as well as reference photographs and original production drawings.  The original props were made quickly, of lightweight materials, to suit the needs of film production. The replica is cast from a heavyweight polyresin and features metal fittings. Although visually identical to the original, the replica has more heft and strength than the original props.  Physical triggers are not present on the original props; they were deliberately omitted for practical reasons, to allow the actors to hold the props and fit their fingers into the area where a trigger would normally be while wearing thick astronaut gloves.  The replica features an ultra-bright blue LED light effect, activated by a concealed button, as a homage to the ground-breaking rotoscoped visual effects and to enhance the 70's laser-weapon aesthetic.  Inspired by the Moonraker laser's later appearances in 007 video games, scope detail and a movable 'selector-lever' have also been incorporated into the replica.  Each replica includes a certificate of authenticity booklet, a display stand and an individually numbered metal plaque. The edition size is 750 pieces.  Requires 2 x AAA (LR3) Batteries. Batteries included.
nodes.name: Moonraker Laser

nodes.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse present the Tenten Collectible Figure!  From the anime series Naruto:Shippuden comes a new Naruto Girls Tenten figure! Standing at 9.36' tall and holding her scroll, she is sculpted in amazing detail.  Don't miss your chance to add this Naruto figure to your anime collectibles display today!
nodes.name: Tenten

nodes.description: From the hit, anime Overlord comes a new figure of the werewolf battle maid Lupusregina Beta! Perched atop a pillar, she flashes a mischievous grin with her battle crosier strapped onto her back. Order yours today!
nodes.name: Lupusregina Beta (So-bin Version)

nodes.description: The adult horror manga against which all others are measured continues in another incredible deluxe oversized hardcover edition, the Berserk Deluxe Volume 11 Hardcover Book!  Guts the Black Swordsman and company prepare to leave the port of Vritannis, only to have their way blocked by an army of abominations led by a powerful Kushan sorcerer. Even Guts' accursed Berserker armor may not be enough to stem the bestial tide, especially when faced by the leviathan astral form of the malefic Kushan Emperor!   This Deluxe edition collects Berserk volumes 31-33, including three-fold-out color posters.  Enter the dark fantasy world of Berserk and add this Deluxe collection to your library today!
nodes.name: Berserk Deluxe Volume 11

nodes.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse are excited to present the Chopperemon (Warriors Alliance) Collectible Figure!  From the One Piece anime comes a new Portrait of Pirates One Piece collectible figure. Standing at 4.1' tall the toddler-sized human/reindeer hybrid of the Straw Hat Pirates is seen throwing ninja stars.  Don't miss your chance to add this Tony Tony Chopper figure to your One Piece collectibles display today!
nodes.name: Chopperemon (Warriors Alliance)

nodes.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse present the Kento Nanami Collectible Figure!  From the anime series Jujutsu Kaisen comes the latest Jujutsu Kaisen collectible figure. Standing at 8.7' tall and dressed in his usual business suit, this sorcerer is carrying his blunt sword with the same spotted pattern to match his tie.  Don't miss your chance to add this Kento Nanami figure to your anime figure collection today!
nodes.name: Kento Nanami

nodes.description: I will do what I must. – Obi-Wan KenobiAvailable for pre-order for a limited time only.  During the reign of the Galactic Empire, former Jedi™ Master, Obi-Wan Kenobi, embarked on a crucial mission. The once legendary Jedi must confront Darth Vader™ and face the wrath of the Empire…  After witnessing the climactic finale of the Obi-Wan Kenobi live-action series, Sideshow and Hot Toys are thrilled to officially introduce the new Obi-Wan Kenobi Sixth Scale Collectible Figure from the DX series!   The Star Wars collectible figure is meticulously crafted with a newly developed head sculpt with rolling eyeball function allowing postionable eyelline, finely tailored Jedi outfit, LED light-up lightsaber, an interchangeable lightsaber blade emulating the weapon in motion, a blaster pistol, a LO-LA59 droid, binoculars, holoprojector, a Bail Organa hologram miniature, and a rocky diorama base on which to recreate Obi-Wan's showdown with Darth Vader!  This is an astonishing Obi-Wan Kenobi collectible figure that belongs in every Star Wars collection!
nodes.name: Obi-Wan Kenobi (Special Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Star Ace Toys Ltd. present the Medusa (Deluxe Version) Statue.  Ray Harryhausen brought to life many mythical creatures and none are more memorable than the Gorgon, Medusa.  With her snake-like tail and hideous head with snakes for hair, just one glance at this terrifying creature will turn any hero into stone.  Star Ace has recreated the Harryhausen Medusa puppet as a 30cm tall soft vinyl statue. She is posed ready to loose an arrow as she stares down the hero invading her sanctum.  Sculpted by the renowned artisans at Kaibutsuya and Artist, Joe Laudati, each piece is meticulously hand painted.  The Deluxe Version comes with a polyresin diorama base depicting a flaming brazier and the remains of one of her enemies, turned to stone.
nodes.name: Medusa (Deluxe Version)

nodes.description: The Goddess of Thunder was quick to receive a Bishoujo statue by Shunya Yamashita. Appearing out of thin air, the mysterious figure, Lady Thor, is none other than Jane Foster! Holding Mjolnir aloft, Thor stands in a pose fit for the God of Thunder.  Her muscular figure is strengthened by the power of Mjolnir, wearing a silver helmet and armor, and a fluttering cape that gives the Thor statue the elegance of a refined Asgardian. The statue can be displayed without the helmet by exchanging it with a separate head part.  The Marvel figure base can be connected to that of the Loki Laufeyson Bishoujo Statue — sold separately.
nodes.name: Thor (Jane Foster) Bishoujo

nodes.description: After Ragnarök, the 'end' in Norse mythology, Loki returns as a young woman. Shunya Yamashita's astounding Bishoujo Loki statue is back!  Taking possession of Sif and gaining a female body, Loki has been sculpted into a gorgeous, fashionable, and voluptuous figure. A born trickster with a good and evil side, what will Loki's next scheme be?   The Marvel figure base can be connected to that of Thor (Jane Foster) Bishoujo Statue — sold separately.
nodes.name: Loki Laufeyson Bishoujo

nodes.description: Netflix's Emmy Award-winning series Stranger Things has captivated the imaginations of millions of viewers all around the world. Now fans can experience the series like never before, with the first official Stranger Things Tarot Deck and Guidebook! Featuring original artwork inspired by classic tarot iconography, this 78-card deck comprises both major and minor arcana and depicts fan-favorite characters, imagery, and themes from the acclaimed hit series. Each card is a work of art featuring an original, detailed image of iconic characters and scenes from Stranger Things, from the dreaded Demogorgon and the sinister Mind Flayer to dynamic duo Steve Harrington and Robin Buckley!  Packaged in a beautiful collectible gift box, it's a totally tubular gift for Stranger Things fans and tarot enthusiasts alike!
nodes.name: Stranger Things Tarot Deck and Guidebook

nodes.description: Sideshow and Star Ace Toys Ltd. present the Medusa Statue.  Ray Harryhausen brought to life many mythical creatures and none are more memorable than the Gorgon, Medusa.  With her snake-like tail and hideous head with snakes for hair, just one glance at this terrifying creature will turn any hero into stone.  Star Ace has recreated the Harryhausen Medusa puppet as a 30cm tall soft vinyl statue. She is posed ready to loose an arrow as she stares down the hero invading her sanctum.  Sculpted by the renowned artisans at Kaibutsuya and Artist, Joe Laudati, each piece is meticulously hand painted.
nodes.name: Medusa

nodes.description: Netflix's Emmy Award-winning series Stranger Things has captivated the imaginations of millions of viewers all around the world. Now fans can experience the series like never before with stunning, pop-off-the-page re-creations of iconic moments from the show.  Inside, readers will adventure alongside Eleven and Mike Wheeler, crack the Russian code with Steve Harrington at Scoops Ahoy, face off against the terrifying Demogorgon, and much more.  Featuring five richly detailed spreads packed with jaw-dropping pops, Stranger Things: The Ultimate Pop-Up Book is an explosive, must-have guide to Hawkins, Indiana, the Upside Down, and beyond!
nodes.name: Stranger Things: The Ultimate Pop-Up Book

nodes.description: Trick or Treat Studios and Lionsgate are proud to present the Officially Licensed Spiral: From The Book of Saw Mr. Snuggles Puppet Prop Replica!  This amazing prop was sculpted by Mark Anthony, the absolute King of replica movie props and owner of The Scary Closet.  Every detail of the screen-used Mr. Snuggles is represented in this prop. The head, hands, and feet are made of vinyl for ultimate durability and accuracy. The head has a sculpted attached hat and ears attached via interlocked eyelets allowing them to move freely. The body is made in flexible polyurethane foam with an ultra-strong wireframe. The puppet comes fully clothed in distress uniform with a shirt, tie, pants, and a jacket featuring a vinyl star badge. It includes the screen-accurate small vinyl pistol.  The puppet stands approximately 16.5' tall and comes in a beautiful full-color collectors window box.   Horror fans! The next chapter of Saw awaits, and Mr. Snuggles needs a home! Add to your collection today!
nodes.name: Mr. Snuggles Puppet

nodes.description: Having completed the Faces of the Empire™, we now transition to the Faces of the First Order™. This menacing 1oz pure silver coin features the tormented Leader of the Knights of Ren™.   This coin is superbly crafted to replicate the shape and color of the supreme leader's helmet. To further enhance the design, some relief has been added. The Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II is engraved on the obverse, confirming it as legal tender.   Officially licensed each coin comes safely stored inside a Star Wars™ themed case, which includes a large window for display. A Certificate of Authenticity can be found on the back of the case, along with the coin's unique number in the limited mintage of 10,000. Flip open the box to find the specifications.  With this menacing piece, you'll sure be seduced to the Dark side. Order today!
nodes.name: Kylo Ren 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: NAUTS and DAMTOYS are proud to team up to deliver the Sixth Scale Claire Redfield Collectible Figure from the popular CAPCOM game RESIDENT EVIL 2!  The latest female body developed by Damtoys can be posed to perfectly recreate the character's style, with over 30 movable joints to provide collectors with great playability through the possible poses.  The accurate and meticulously crafted costume can be switched between the styles from earlier and later stages of the game. All weapon accessories dedicated to this character are newly made, with not just the appearance and finishing strictly faithful to the game, but also realistic movable weapon structures.  With a great choice of weapons, accessories, and a fully articulated body, this is one video game figure you don't want to miss out on!  Resident Evil collectibles fans, try to escape Raccoon city with the help of Claire Redfield, and add to your collection today!
nodes.name: Claire Redfield

nodes.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya are proud to present the Megatron Bishoujo Statue!  Based on the enthralling toy concept of everyday objects transforming into robot-like lifeforms, The Transformers series has captivated the world with its films and cartoons.  Since 1984, this series has been loved by people from all walks of life across the globe and now, Hasbro, Takara Tomy, and Kotobukiya have teamed up to create the new BISHOUJO TRANSFORMERS collectibles series!  Laying the foundations for the still beloved series, the first generation, The Transformers (or G1 for short), have been given a Bishoujo-style makeover by Shunya Yamashita. The second statue in the series, Megatron, is the Emperor of Destruction and leader of the Decepticons.  'You fools!!' - This is one cold hard Bishoujo with a stare that could kill.  Her bob hairstyle with straight bangs, garrison cap, and dark eye shadow are merely a few of the features that have been carefully designed to capture the feel of the original Transformer. A pearl colorway beautifully adorns her military uniform. A contrasting crude gun metallic color is used to paint the Fusion Cannon, attached to her right shoulder. The details including the handle of the cannon skillfully incorporate the aspects of the original Megatron.  The Megatron figure base also has the Decepticons logo in a stunningly painted metallic colorway. Bumblebee will also be receiving a makeover as the third installment to the series! Roll out!
nodes.name: Megatron Bishoujo

nodes.description: Sideshow and Dark Horse Comics are proud to present the Spartan Yoroi PVC Statue!  Only the noblest and most skilled of warriors are able to don the blessed Spartan Yoroi armor, a masterpiece collectible for any Halo fan. Featuring the Scarlett Empress coating, the traditional Kabuto helmet, Gatekeeper shoulder pads, and the Shadow Raven knee pads, this statue is fit for battle.  Exclusively available in the Halo Infinite Multiplayer - Fracture: Tenrai event, now this legendary armor set can be yours to hold. Standing at just over 10' high and intricately painted, this Spartan will be an exemplary addition to any collection.  Be sure to secure yours and order today!
nodes.name: Spartan Yoroi

nodes.description: Sideshow and Threezero present the Lucas Sinclair Sixth Scale Figure.  Lucas Sinclair lives in Hawkins, Indiana with his best friends Mike, Dustin, Will, Eleven and Max. He is realistic and logical, always keeping the group focused in the face of danger. Always prepared with his slingshot & binoculars, Lucas is an indispensable team member in the fight against the dangers of the Upside Down.  The Stranger Things – sixth scale Lucas Sinclair collectible figure stands approximately 9.3 inches (~23.6 cm) tall and features a fully-articulated original body with approximately 28 points of articulation and fabric clothing.  The highly-detailed Stranger Things collectible figure includes one head sculpt with an authentic likeness to the character's appearance in the hit Netflix series Stranger Things. Accessories include a utility belt, backpack, slingshot, one pair of binoculars, a walkie-talkie, flashlight, compass, wristwatch, and five pairs of interchangeable hands.
nodes.name: Lucas Sinclair

nodes.description: Sideshow and Infinite Statue present the Vincent Price Statue.  Vincent Price is considered one of the most iconic and beloved stars of classic horror movies in the world. Sophisticated, ironic and theatrical, Vincent Price succeeded in giving his evil, ruthless, sadistic, morally questionable personalities a grotesque character, a menacing and casual elegance that together with his unique and unmistakable voice brought him great success and his nickname as Master of Menace .  From House of Wax to Edgar Alan Poe's masterpieces, from House on Haunted Hill to his last performance in Tim Burton's Edward Scissorhands in 1990, Vincent Price played the dark, stylish side of evil with irony and chilling talent.  Inspired by one of his most iconic performances, this statuette is intended to be the finest possible tribute to one of the greatest actors, a man who has become the embodiment of horror cinema of all time.  His imposing figure, his penetrating gaze and his legendary laugh (He provided the narration and the final laugh in Michael Jackson's Thriller) make Vincent Price a monument of cinema.
nodes.name: Vincent Price

nodes.description: Sideshow and Beast Kingdom present the Blue & Beta D-Stage Statue.  The D-Stage, staging your dream collection from Beast Kingdom is ready to roar it's way onto a desk near you with the release of the Jurassic World collection of dioramas!  Fusing the old and the new in this last movie from the Jurassic World trilogy, beloved velociraptor Blue now has a baby named Beta!  Standing on a snowy mound, the lush forest landscape is a perfect setting to find our new and old characters in! Take home a little bit of the movie magic, in full three dimensional form with the D-Stage collection!
nodes.name: Blue & Beta D-Stage

nodes.description: Sideshow and Banpresto are proud to present the Itachi Uchiha Collectible Figure. From the popular anime series, Naruto Shippuden, comes Uchiha Itachi on his throne! The Uchiha Hideout, built into a large terraced mountain contained a large meeting hall decorated with symbols of the Uchiha clan. In this meeting room sat the throne, with Itachi sat upon it, as is depicted here in this Dioratic figure where he awaits a climactic, definitive battle...  Standing 6.7 inches high, this Itachi Uchiha anime figure will make a great addition to your Naruto collectibles display — coming in multiple color options to match whatever aesthetic you like. Order today!
nodes.name: Itachi Uchiha (Anime)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Bandai present the EVA-01 Test Type Collectible Figure!  The designer of Evangelion, Ikuto Yamashita, has joined forces with Bandai to create this METAL BUILD edition of the famed character, capturing its steel-and-muscle appearance as no other figure has before. The body features diecast metal parts and chrome plating for a luxurious weight and finish. Re-designed from the ground up, this incredibly posable portrayal of the EVA-01 is packed with visual detail and play value.
nodes.name: EVA-01 Test Type

nodes.description: Sideshow and Beast Kingdom present the T-Rex D-Stage Statue.  The D-Stage, staging your dream collection from Beast Kingdom is ready to roar its way onto a desk near you with the release of the Jurassic World collection of dioramas!  One of the scariest and most ferocious creatures that has ever walked this planet, the T-Rex, is seen here paired with a classic ancient scene, including an erupting volcano and lush forests!  Can you spot an important link to the movies at his feet? Take home a little bit of the movie magic, in full three dimensional form with the D-Stage collection!
nodes.name: T-Rex D-Stage

nodes.description: Sideshow and Beast Kingdom present the Shoretrooper Egg Attack Action Figure. The Shoretrooper was a specialized Imperial soldier that specializes in the defense of tropical island zones. They were the loyal vanguard of the Galactic Empire. In addition to retaining the high playability and delicate structural details, the new Egg Attack Action series products designed based on the movie Rogue One: A Star Wars Story have also perfectly restored the coastal sand equipment as well as the exclusive pistol and rifle blaster weapons that are essential to the vanguard. This 6-Inch ultra poseable figure features up to 26 moveable joints, 3 extra pairs of hands, and an exclusive stand!
nodes.name: Shoretrooper

nodes.description: Sideshow and Banpresto are proud to present the Itachi Uchiha Collectible Figure. From the popular anime series, Naruto Shippuden, comes Uchiha Itachi on his throne! The Uchiha Hideout, built into a large terraced mountain contained a large meeting hall decorated with symbols of the Uchiha clan. In this meeting room sat the throne, with Itachi sat upon it, as is depicted here in this Dioratic figure where he awaits a climactic, definitive battle...  Standing 6.7 inches high, this Itachi Uchiha anime figure will make a great addition to your Naruto collectibles display — coming in multiple color options to match whatever aesthetic you like. Order today!
nodes.name: Itachi Uchiha (Brush Tones)

nodes.description: Show off your love for SUPERMAN™ with this incredible silver miniature designed by 3D master sculptor Alejandro Pereira Ezcurra. The second in the series is inspired by the cover of Superman #204 as part of the For Tomorrow comic book story arc.   Using a minimum of 150g pure silver this amazing collectible showcases the hero in a powerful pose, with one foot on top of a gargoyle. The miniature is approximately 9 cm tall and the silver purity, DC copyright and unique serial number are detailed on the silver base.   Created in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, each is packaged inside a large, high-quality SUPERMAN™-themed case and comes with an additional stand, so you can display this awesome collectible with ease.   There will only be 1,000 casts made, fly in quick and grab yours today!
nodes.name: Superman Silver Miniature

nodes.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - X-Men Sauron! From Marvel Comics, the X-Men Sauron Art Scale Statue is limited edition and comes with a detailed hand-painted base.  X-Men fans, don't miss your chance to add this statue to your Marvel collection!
nodes.name: X-Men Sauron

nodes.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 Series line - Loki! From Marvel: The Infinity Saga, the Loki Art Scale Statue is limited edition and comes atop a detailed and hand-painted throne.  Marvel fans, don't miss your chance to add the Loki 1:10 Statue to your collection!
nodes.name: Loki

nodes.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Witch-King of Angmar! From The Lord of the Rings, the Witch-King of Angmar1:10 Art Scale Statue is hand-painted.  Don't miss your chance to add this limited edition statue to your Lord of the Rings collection!
nodes.name: Witch-King of Angmar

nodes.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Wonder Twins! Based on original references, these polystone statues of Zan and Jayna are hand-painted and limited edition. DC Comics fans, don't miss your chance to add the Wonder Twins to your DC collection!
nodes.name: Wonder Twins

nodes.description: While this black and white buddy might be a little on the silent side, he tells the story of hands that have shaped modern pop culture! Reframe your view with the Kevin Smith: Guru Askew Designer Collectible Toy by artist Chogrin today.  Artist Statement: Growing up in the '90s I never thought that one day I'd be making a toy paying tribute to one of my creative heroes. Guru Askew is my tribute to Kevin Smith's universe and the many different entrepreneurial hats he has worn over the years. From filmmaking to writing comics to podcasting, Kevin's trailblazing has allowed and inspired indie filmmakers and artists to get high off their own supply as well. And so, I proudly present to you Kevin Smith: Guru Askew!   Artist Bio: Chogrin is an illustrator & storyteller from Guayaquil, Ecuador. Rubber hose animation, classic Japanese cartoons, his childhood, and pop-culture are among the many influences for his artwork and stories. For the last decade his illustrations & toys have been featured in various art galleries and publications around the world. He's also worked in the animation industry on shows like Adventure Time & Regular Show. He's currently writing children's books and directing various animated projects.
nodes.name: Kevin Smith: Guru Askew

nodes.description: Iron Man Mark LXXXV is the most advanced and powerful armor Tony Stark has ever created. It's a special armor that gives Stark superhuman strength, durability, flight, and a variety of high-tech weapons.   Inspired by the design of Tony Stark's very last Iron Man suit in MCU, Hot Toys is excited to present the Holographic Version of Iron Man Mark LXXXV Sixth Scale Collectible Figure in metallic blue as this year's toy fair exclusive item only available in selected markets.  Masterfully crafted based on Iron Man Mark LXXXV in Avengers: Endgame, the diecast figure giving the armor a holographic twist features a helmet head with LED-light up function, intricate design of the Iron Man armor reproduced in blue accent with a metallic appearance, LED light-up functions scattered throughout the upper body, back and Arc Reactor on chest, highly-detailed weapons including Nano Lightning Refocuser, energy blade, Katar and a pair of Nano Repulsor Cannons, interchangeable hands, and specially designed figure stand.   This holographic version of Iron Man will surely stand out in your Hall of Armors collection!
nodes.name: Iron Man Mark LXXXV (Holographic Version)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Threezero are proud to present the MDLX Bumblebee (Gold Edition) Collectible Figure which features a unique metallic gold paint finish. It is a limited-edition figure with only 2000 pieces available.   MDLX is a new series of articulated figures capturing the spirit of Threezero's renown DLX series at a smaller scale with a similar high range of articulation and great durability resulting in a groundbreaking affordable price.  The Transformers MDLX line of figures is based on the original 1980s The Transformers cartoon and toy line, as redesigned by Threezero Art Director Kelvin Sau. The iconic designs have been remixed to incorporate Threezero's hyper-detailed mechanical aesthetic, offering a familiar and exciting new presentation. Transformers MDLX figures feature Threezero's unique die-cast zinc alloy and engineer-grade plastic frame system, which retains the tactile playability and durability of the figure. Each figure is finished off with the detailed craftsmanship and weathered paint application that Threezero is known for, bringing beloved Transformers characters to a new format for all to enjoy.  This collectible figure is approximately 5 (120 mm) tall, with 36 points of articulation and a die-cast metal frame. Accessories include one laser blaster, one standard head, one masked head, and three pairs of interchangeable hands.
nodes.name: Bumblebee MDLX (Gold Edition)

nodes.description: The strength of two warrior cultures combines in the Black Panther (Purple Edition) Designer Collectible Bust by artist Jesse Hernandez, AKA Urban Aztec. T'Challa flexes his claws in a Wakandan salute, wearing his futuristic Vibranium suit infused with ancient design sensibilities. This limited-edition convention exclusive variant is fit for a king — unleash the energy of the Black Panther on your Marvel collection today!  About the Artist:Jesse Hernandez (@UrbanAztec) is a visual artist born and raised in the San Francisco Bay area, most widely recognized for his street art murals, vinyl toys, and diverse Illustration work. His style is known as Urban Aztec, a combination of graffiti and ancient indigenous culture. Hernandez's artwork has been featured by Warner Bros., the San Jose Sharks, the Oakland Museum, Rockstar energy drink, Rolling Stone magazine, Fandango, Juxtapoz, Gears of War 4, X-Box, Playstation, Run the Jewels, Oakland Athletics, and the Cosmopolitan Las Vegas. Hernandez has shown art in galleries and museums around the world. He has also painted murals in Oakland, San Francisco, Los Angeles, Mexico City and Amsterdam.
nodes.name: Black Panther Purple Variant

nodes.description: S.H.Figuarts, always dedicated to capturing both the posability and form of popular characters, is proud to announce the arrival of Majin Buu -EVIL-! In keeping with his evil countenance, the set includes plenty of parts to let you recreate your favorite scenes. It also includes an extra head for the S.H.Figurarts Majin Buu -GOOD- figure (sold separately) to further enhance your display possibilities!
nodes.name: Majin Buu -SUPER-

nodes.description: 'You will learn what it means to insult House Dimitrescu!   Sideshow and PureArts present the Lady Dimitrescu Quarter Scale Statue.  One of the Four Lords of the village, the Countess Alcina Dimitrescu ruled from her noble family's estate, Castle Dimitrescu, and was feared by all.  PureArts is proud to introduce one of the most popular antagonists in the history of the Resident Evil franchise in stunning detail. Standing an impressive 35 tall, our Resident Evil Lady Dimitrescu 1/4 Scale Statue with custom tailored dress, massive extended claws and gorgeous face details will be the centerpiece of any collection!
nodes.name: Lady Dimitrescu

nodes.description: The sixth release in the FRIENDS™ Chibi® Coin series features Monica Geller™. She is the last of the six friends to be released, but definitely not the least. Intelligent and warm-hearted, Monica is a chef who enjoys cleaning and looking after her friends.  This 1oz pure silver piece is shaped and colored to resemble Monica in her chef's uniform, but as Chibi art. The obverse of the coin bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II.  Created in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, the coin arrives in a FRIENDS™-themed case and includes a large window, perfect for display. The Certificate of Authenticity is printed on the back, which further confirms the coin's legal tender status, along with its unique serial number in the limited mintage of 2,000.   A true epitome of intelligent and warm-hearted — who's a better character to look up to than Monica?   Order today and get the whole gang together!
nodes.name: Monica Geller 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: Next in the FRIENDS™ Chibi Coin Series includes the guy with the best sarcastic humor, Chandler Bing™!   This delightful 1oz pure silver coin has been shaped and colored to resemble Chandler as Chibi art. It shows him holding his pet chicken in his wool waistcoat (heh). The obverse of the coin bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II, confirming it is legal tender.   The coin arrives in a FRIENDS™-themed case and includes a large window, perfect for display. The Certificate of Authenticity is printed on the back which further confirms the coin's legal tender status, along with its unique serial number in the limited mintage of 2,000 coins.   Remember the antics of Chandler today!
nodes.name: Chandler Bing 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: Sideshow and Soap Studio present the Pebbles and Bamm-Bamm (Wedding Version) Statue.  The Flintstones is an American animated TV series that takes place in a parallel modern-day and Stone Age world setting. It was produced by Hanna-Barbera and first aired from 1960 to 1966.  This statue features the adorable Pebbles Flinstone, daughter of Fred and Wilma Flinstone, and the mighty Bamm-Bamm, adopted son of Barney and Betty Rubble, both themed in wedding attire.  Whether you are a fan of The Flinstones or classic cartoon collectibles, be sure to add this to your collection today!
nodes.name: Pebbles and Bamm-Bamm (Wedding Version)

nodes.description: From the anime series Chainsaw Man comes a 1:7 scale figure of Denji's reliable buddy, Power!  Produced by FNEX and sculpted by Design COCO at 8.7' tall, the greedy and manipulative Blood Fiend is captured in a fearless pose surrounded by weapons made from her own blood using her Blood Manipulation technique as she gives a confident, somewhat mischievous smile.  Her outfit has been carefully sculpted down to the disheveled look of her hoodie and untucked shirt and the details of her high-top sneakers. Even the sculpting of her hair is on point as it drapes down her back and her long bangs fall in front of her face.   Don't miss your chance to add this Power Collectible Figure to your anime collection today!
nodes.name: Power

nodes.description: Introducing the Thor Love and Thunder Cosplay Mini Backpack from Loungefly. This faux leather mini backpack features applique, Debossed, printed, and glow-in-the-dark details, as well as adjustable straps.  Be sure to add this Thor Love and Thunder Cosplay Mini Backpack to your wardrobe today!
nodes.name: Thor Love and Thunder Cosplay Mini Backpack

nodes.description: In the Star Wars: War of the Bounty Hunters™ comic, fans learn what happened to the infamous bounty hunter before he could deliver the frozen-in-carbonite Han Solo™ to Jabba the Hutt™, Boba Fett's journey has not been smooth as he is forced to hide his identity to fight in dangerous arena battles…   Inspired by this story of Boba Fett's adventure, Sideshow and Hot Toys are delighted to present the Boba Fett (Arena Suit) Sixth Scale Collectible Figure as a toy fair exclusive item for select markets!   The collectible figure is skillfully crafted with an all-black Mandalorian helmet and armor, a black jumpsuit, a jetpack, a spear, a pair of blaster pistols, a blaster rifle, and a display base!  This unique look of Boba Fett will surely be a great addition for any Star Wars collectors!
nodes.name: Boba Fett (Arena Suit)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Manas Sum Inc. are proud to present the Monkey King in the Sky Statue from the acclaimed role-playing game, Asura Online!  Based on the classic Chinese tale Journey to the West, the massively multiplayer online game features the demigod Monkey King, captured in beautiful detail here in this hand-painted resin statue by the artisans at Manas Sum.  Start your journey into the fantastic and supernatural world of Asura Online by adding the Monkey King to your collection today!
nodes.name: Monkey King in the Sky
Frankie Reborn by Olivia De Berardinis Statue

nodes.description: While other places have ponies or parrots … we have dragons.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the There Were Dragons Fine Art Print, a breathtaking piece of original How to Train Your Dragon artwork by artist George Caltsoudas.  This is Berk. Join Hiccup Horrendous Haddock III and his fellow Vikings as they take to the skies on their dragons. Once a plague on the humble island village, these ferocious beasts have become steadfast friends to the young heroes willing to make peace with their enemies. Hiccup and Toothless lead the charge for change while twins Ruffnut and Tuffnut ride their Hideous Zippleback, Snotlout manages his Monstrous Nightmare, and Astrid soars with her Deadly Nadder. A classic Celtic knotwork-inspired border frames the illustration, although it cannot contain the speed and span of the Night Fury's adventurous wings.  Each There Were Dragons Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 400 pieces. Available unframed and in a custom framed presentation, this fantasy artwork is a must-have for fans of the How to Train Your Dragon series.  Bring your collection to new heights on the back of the There Were Dragons Fine Art Print by George Caltsoudas today!
nodes.name: There Were Dragons

nodes.description: I'm always Jean. And I'm always the Phoenix.   Sideshow presents the Jean Grey Phoenix Transformation Fine Art Print, an intense Marvel art print by Kael Ngu.  Two beings, eternally linked, fight for dominance in the Jean Grey Phoenix Transformation Fine Art Print. In the foreground the Phoenix wears a shimmering suit of green and gold. Her red hair sweeps upwards with a blaze of yellow and orange flames, revealing Jean Grey's shadowy silhouette in the background. Clad in her '90s X-Men suit, Jean has lost control, trapped in her own mind as she relinquishes her body to the fires of rebirth.  Each Jean Grey Phoenix Transformation Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Sideshow logo as part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Inspired by the dynamic Phoenix and Jean Grey Maquette by Sideshow, sold separately, this X-Men art is available as an unframed giclée and in a custom framed presentation to allow for different display options alongside the statue.  Embrace your power when you bring home the Jean Grey Phoenix Transformation Fine Art Print by Kael Ngu today!
nodes.name: Jean Grey: Phoenix Transformation

nodes.description: Recently, I made a promise to myself that the next time I got a boyfriend, I'd be on the lookout for red flags.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Harley Quinn: Red Flags Fine Art Print, a flowery and fabulous DC Comics art print by artist Kevin McGivern.  When you're in love, it's easy to ignore the warning signs — but killing kids is a big one! Inspired by Margot Robbie's unforgettable live-action appearance as the emancipated, empowered Harley Quinn in 2021's The Suicide Squad, this colorful portrait features a cavalcade of cartoony birds and blooms. Harley gleefully skips her way through the surreal surroundings towards freedom while bullet holes pepper the walls of the Corto Maltese prison cell.  Each Harley Quinn: Red Flags Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this imaginative Harley Quinn wall art is a must-have for fans of The Suicide Squad or the Maid of Mischief herself.  Don't wait for anyone to tell you what to do with your javelin — or your art collection! Bring home the Harley Quinn: Red Flags Fine Art Print by Kevin McGivern today.
nodes.name: Harley Quinn: Red Flags

nodes.description: Tucked away in the ornate detailing of Jabba the Hutt's™ Sail Barge, the Khetanna™ is a fantastic tribute to the Rancor™. Almost hidden, yet on a prominent pillar in the film, this adornment is sure to thrill. Sideshow and Regal Robot are proud to present a magnetic mini-sculpture that draws inspiration from that on-set artwork.  Part of the Parts of the Galaxy Collection, Regal Robot created this magnet using high-resolution 3D scanning of the original artifact. Each approximately 5″ tall Rancor Corbel Magnet is solid resin and hand-finished with a faux bronze look by the FX artists in our New York studios. Hand-applied patina accents the amazing details and wonderful organic sculpture and makes each a unique work of art.  They're 100% made-in-the-U.S.A. and come ready to display. Like the other Star Wars™-inspired decor pieces, this rancor-themed magnet will bring some classic Star Wars style into your home, office, man-cave, or fridge today!
nodes.name: Rancor Corbel Magnet

nodes.description: Sideshow and Kami-Arts present the Naruto 1:6 scale Statue!  Naruto figure in 1:6 size, the statue represents all the team 7 gathered in a single statue. The scene represents all the protagonists of the cult manga in a defensive position ready to attack the enemy.  Kami-Arts wanted to please all the Naruto community by proposing for the first time in statue, all the team reunited Naruto Uzumaki, Sasuke Uchiha, Sakura Haruno, Kakashi Hatake, and… even the ninken Pakkun! Everything starts with this group and it is normal to propose to you the whole team 7 for their first Naruto project. A wise but founding project.
nodes.name: Naruto
